target: 4. A Job Wishing for Peace
Totsumura-san, how was it? The response from the mainland...
Did they believe the story?
Hmm... hard to say.
I see…
But it seems my desperate explanation paid off, because they seem to have realized the severity of the situation.
They promised to send more backup tomorrow morning.
Really!?
Yeah, we can rest easy for now.
And it's all thanks to me talking their ears off as best I could!
Talking their ears off...
Also, that wasn't the only thing I talked to the mainland about. I asked about some other things too.
What other things?
The backup detectives who were supposed to come today. They should have arrived on the island a long time ago, but the mainland can't contact them either.
…Really?!
The people in charge over there were troubled too. Jeez, where are they slacking off?
I wonder what happened to the detectives...
Anyway, we have no choice but to wait for tomorrow's backup for now. ...Be careful out there.
Shin-chan, let's head back before it gets too late, okay?
Yeah, you're right.
W-Wait a minute! Are you two going back to Kofune?
Eh? Isn't that obvious?
Is there something else?
You could say there is, or you could say there isn't...
What is it? You're being vague.
~~~~~~! I-It's nothing, you two head back before it gets dark.
Is that so? Well then, we'll be off...
Ah…
W-What?
It's nothing, nothing at all.
Um, this is just a guess, but... are you scared, Totsumura-san?
T-There's no way! I'm a policeman, a hero of justice!
Even tonight, I have the important job of holing up in the station and earnestly wishing for the peace of the island.
No, please patrol instead of wishing...
...Hey. Was it a bad idea to leave Tetsu-san alone?
If Tetsu-san really is being targeted by a Shadow, it would be better if he was with someone...
That's true, but... It's better not to make any careless moves right now.
If the Shadows are acting disguised as people, it wouldn't be strange if they were watching our movements.
If we show any strange movements here, it might put Totsumura-san in danger...
So it's better for us to act as normal as possible.
Yeah…
(I'm not without my own worries... if something were to happen to Totsumura-san.)
(But Mio's Shadow probably only killed Totsumura-san because he happened to talk to her.)
(It's not like she was targeting Totsumura-san from the beginning.)
(We can't do anything on our own.)
(Anyway, meeting up with the backup detectives from the mainland is our top priority.)
(To protect Mio too...)
Shin-chan, hold on a second...

What's wrong?
Dinner will be ready soon.
No, that's not it. I'm thinking of going to Tokiko's house now...
...Now?
Is it too dangerous?
Well, we don't know when Shadow Mio might show up.
I know that, but... I have something important to do.
Can't that wait until tomorrow afternoon or something?
Tokiko said she has plans tomorrow afternoon... So tonight is the only time we have.
(Sou is over there too, so it might be safer to be at Tokiko's place than here...)
(Their security is probably better than ours too.)
Alright. I'll walk you there.
Really! Thanks, Shin-chan!
So, what's this important matter?
Practicing how to put on... the yukata for the festival.
Eh? What was that?
I-It's nothing! It has nothing to do with you, Shin-chan!
Maybe…
It's gotten completely dark. ...Sorry for doing this so late.
It's fine.
(I brought a knife just in case... I think it'll be fine at the Hishigata house, but...)
...Hey, Shin-chan.
Hm?
About tomorrow…

Tomorrow?
Did something happen?
Jeez, you really did forget. Tomorrow is the Hitogashima Summer Festival!!
Ah… Yeah, that's right.
(Honestly, I don't have the leeway to think about that, but... depending on how you look at it, it might actually be convenient.)
(If it gets lively with the festival, it might make it harder for the Shadows to make a move...)
Hey, about the festival...
Mio!
Tokiko!?
Jeez, you were late so I got worried.
You did!? ...S-Sorry.
Shinpei-san walked you here, huh.
Yeah, it's dangerous to walk around alone. You should be careful too, Tokiko-chan.
I suppose so...
Shin-chan! Someone's coming!
I-Is it my Shadow...?
Mio, Tokiko-chan, hide behind me!
Y-Yeah!
(Damn it! Can I protect Mio and Tokiko-chan by myself?)
(Calm down, grasp the situation first! Look at it objectively!)
Eh?
Huhhh, you shouldn't be walking around this late.
...He reeks of alcohol.
...Totsumura-san, how can you drink at a time like this...
It's the opposite! It's because of this situation that I can't stay sober. ...*Hic*.
Even if you're off duty, I don't think it's right for a police officer to be that drunk...
I was feeling lonely by myself, so it couldn't be helped.
At a time like this, the only one who can heal my heart is <color=#GF_TIPS_001>Erika-chan</color>. It's only natural to think that way.
You went to <color=#GF_TIPS_045>Miyako</color>, huh...
Yeah, but... Mama told me to get out. Said I was making the other customers uncomfortable.
What did you do?
I was just warning them out of the kindness of my heart. There's a dangerous phantom killer on the island right now. It's better not to wander around carelessly.
And yet... everyone looked so disgusted. I never thought even Erika-chan would look at me like that...
(True, that might not have been a fitting topic for a fun drinking party...)
(But... considering he was able to give some warning to the islanders, maybe it's not a bad thing...)
Hey, Shin-chan... I wonder what's going to happen with the festival.
Yeah... If this turns into a big uproar, people might not gather like they expect.
(If it comes to that... it might actually be a bad thing...)
Shin-chan, thanks for walking me here. Will you be okay on the way back?

Yeah, I'm fine.
I'm with Totsumura-san.
Erika-chan...
(It'll be fine... right?)
Alright, Tokiko-chan, I'm leaving Mio in your hands.

Yes, I understand.
I won't let my guard down.
So don't worry, and leave the rest to me...
Yeah, counting on you.
Alright, good night, Shin-chan.
Yeah. Good night to you too, Tokiko-chan.
Yes… Goodbye, Shinpei-san.
